title: Xenial Buttery Greek Lamb Gyro
description: A comforting Greek dish featuring tender lamb, wrapped in a warm pita with a buttery amazake sauce, and topped with fresh Mediterranean ingredients. This gyro is perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together amazake, butter, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the sliced lamb to the bowl and marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Grill the lamb for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
Assemble the gyro by spreading a layer of amazake sauce on the pita, followed by a few slices of lamb, some diced tomato, sliced red onion, and a sprinkle of feta cheese.
Drizzle the top with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
